summary: Test suite has fundamental design flaws. All functional tests are bundled into a single mega-test rather than independent bats test cases, violating TDD methodology (no evidence of red-green-refactor). Tests script indirectly through act/GitHub Actions instead of directly invoking it, only checking workflow output markers rather than validating actual JSON output. Edge case coverage is sparse: missing empty axes, invalid JSON, null values, negative numbers, non-scalar axis values, boundary conditions on max-size/max-parallel, and error cases. Test assertions are vague (e.g., grep for 'CASE-OK' string without parsing actual matrix JSON). Heavy reliance on Docker/act makes debugging slow and difficult. Does not follow bats conventions—needs separate @test functions per scenario, proper fixtures, and direct script invocation with jq output validation.
